markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and plan an influencer activation strategy for Reddit's advertising platform](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Reddit aims to increase awareness and consideration for its ad platform through B2B influencer partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [The strategy will focus on high-impact activations (e.g., webinars) with industry leaders to reach decision-makers](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [A pilot program will be developed with aggressive incentives (e.g., ad credits) to create buzz and prove concept](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Success metrics will primarily focus on reach and engagement, not immediate ROAS](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)

## Topics

### Influencer Activation Strategy

  - [Target: B2B influencers, industry experts, agency owners with large networks](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Goals:](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
    1.  Increase awareness and consideration for Reddit ads
    2.  Access decision-maker networks
    3.  Generate positive content and sentiment around Reddit ads
  - [Activation ideas:](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
      - [Co-branded webinars](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
      - [Navigating Reddit guides for specific verticals](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
      - [White papers or insight reports](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Potential incentives:](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
      - [Ad credits (e.g., $5,000 for first 100 webinar registrants)](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
      - [Early access to alpha features](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - [Direct account manager support](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)

### Potential Influencer Partners

  - [Alex from Understory (agency owner)](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
      - [Has testimonial from Adam (CEO of retention.com)](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
      - [Works with high-profile B2B brands](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [Silvio (platform expert)](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [Built learning platform for various ad platforms, including Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
      - [Has existing Reddit curriculum](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)

### Measurement and Success Metrics

  - [Primary focus: Reach and engagement](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
      - [Target: 30,000-50,000 total reach](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
      - [Aim for 10% engagement rate](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [Secondary metrics:](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
      - [Webinar attendance](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
      - [Credit usage and account signups](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)
      - [Content creation and amplification](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Pilot Program Structure

  - [Run 2 activations over 6-8 weeks to gather sufficient data](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Create "crazy" incentives to generate buzz (e.g., $5,000 in ad credits)](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
  - [Tiered credit system to encourage continued usage](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [Emphasize brand association and distribution opportunities for influencers](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Chirag to draft activation ideas and potential incentive structures](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Marcel to compile profiles of suitable influencers for initial activations](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [Both to share thoughts and collaborate on a shared document](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
  - [Aim to launch pilot by mid-to-end of March (Q1)](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [Schedule in-person meeting next week to further discuss plans](https://fathom.video/share/LNMStxMVkbK6xvCkM-kqDfpVDmdf3kjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
